target: Loop 2
2. Shaken by the Ferry
Ushio!!
A-Ah...
(Th-This feeling... could it be?)
...Waaaaah!?

Eh!!?
Ah…!
I'm sorry, I'm sorry!! I-I-I didn't mean to...!!
(Is she... mad...? Well, of course she is. I have to clear up this misunderstanding fast!)
(...Huh? I feel like something like this happened just a little while ago...)
(Wait, no, no. Apologizing comes first right now!)
U-Um! That wasn't on purpose just now—
Ii...taaaaaah~~!!
I-I'm so sorry...!!
Haa...
Are you okay…?
Eh?
You were groaning quite a bit... Did you have a bad dream?
...D-Dream...?
(Ah... this person... I've met her before...!?)
(What's going on...? This person was shot... and there were two Mios...)
(And then what happened? Why am I on the ferry...)
U-Um...
Have you ever... b-been shot by a gun?
Huh?
Are you really okay?
Ah... no, it's nothing...
(Crap! I'm acting like a total creep right now! I might get reported at this rate...)
You should wake up soon.
(She left...)
(I'm glad I wasn't reported, but... I really did something terrible.)
(...Even so.)
(Is it just me, or is this not the first time... I've been slapped by that person?)
(No, there's no way. What am I thinking?)
(Still, my cheek is throbbing. I didn't know a slap could hurt this much. My cheek might even be swollen...)
(I don't have... a mirror. I'll check with my smartphone camera.)
…Huh?
(July... 22nd? This is yesterday's date, isn't it?)
(It's broken... right? There's no way...)
...U-Um, excuse me. Do you have a moment?
...Yes? W-What is it...?
Um... today's date is July 23rd, right...?
Eh? U-Um...
No... I think it's the 22nd. Am I wrong...?
Th... that's right.
I'm sorry, I was mistaken! Excuse me...!
Ah, yes…
(That's right. That was a dream.)
(On the 23rd, I heard about Ushio's Shadow from Mio, and then we went to Hiruko-sama...)
(There were two Mios, and Mio was killed by Mio, and I was probably shot with a handgun...)
...How ridiculous. There's no way that's real.
(It's obvious if I think about it for a second. There's no way something like that could happen in reality.)
(Come to think of it, last night... I fell asleep while reading that.)
(—Ryunosuke Nagumo's "<color=#GF_TIPS_099>Swampman</color>")
(Family and friends being replaced by identical fakes...)
(A horror mystery set in Wakayama City, starring a girl possessed by such delusions.)
(I must have had a bad dream because I fell asleep reading something like that...)
(It seems I'm really quite shaken up about Ushio...)
(Ouch... My cheek is throbbing...)
(Because of that weird dream, my life was almost over...)
(Calm down, calm down... A-At times like this, look at yourself from a <color=#GF_TIPS_062>bird's-eye view</color> and calm down...)
(I was just tired from the sudden phone call and lack of sleep... Take a deep breath and calm down...)
(Come to think of it, that's the first time in my life... I've been slapped, isn't it?)
...Yeah, I'm calming down.
We will soon arrive at Hitogashima Island.
Oh, it's almost time...
(Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture, '<color=#GF_TIPS_050>Hitogashima Island</color>' floating in the Kii Channel. The island visible in the back is Awaji Island.)
(I've returned to this hometown for the first time in two years—)
(—To attend the funeral of my childhood friend, Ushio Kofune.)
